_comment: Machine-readable architectural contract for Agnostic Seed. Read before any code change.

state_layers.name: SSR_HYDRATION
state_layers.note: Full DB read at request time. Client receives pre-populated state.

state_layers.name: PAGE_RECORD
state_layers.critical: Computed during render (useMemo), NOT in useEffect. Zero flash on first paint.

state_layers.name: GLOBAL_STATE
state_layers.note: Kept in sync with PAGE_RECORD via useEffect. Exists for custom modules only.

persistence_flow: 3. Vault assigns UUID if absent, derives _slug from schema.identitySource
4. Vault reads current items, upserts, calls strategy.writeContext()
5. strategy.writeContext() writes to temp file then renames (atomic)
6. Vault returns saved record with stable UUID
7. AppContext dispatches SET_DATA to update local state

lookup_precedence: state.system.activeRecord — async, reducer (fires one render after)
r.data._slug === activeSlug — last-resort fallback, mutable, avoid

schema_contract.naming_rule: Schema name = plain entity name. Use 'projects', never 'schema_projects'.

relation.foreignKey: Field name in child.data that stores parent UUID
relation.parentContext: Context name of the parent entity

schema_contract.fk_auto_resolution: AgnosticCollection reads schema.relation.foreignKey automatically. Manual parentKey only needed as fallback.

strategy_layer.rule: ONLY entry point for mutations. Never write to storage/ from components.

structure.manifest.json: Tenant DNA: strategy selection, feature flags
structure.db/*.json: One file per context. Filename = context name.
structure.modules/*.js: Vanilla JS guest modules — no React, bridge-only

critical_restrictions: NEVER use _slug for internal identity, filtering, or FK references
NEVER call strategy.write() with a partial array — use vault route for all mutations
NEVER write to storage/ from a component
NEVER add schema_ prefix to schema names in schema_definitions.json
NEVER import from src/app/[...slug]/page.tsx — export hooks from src/context/
NEVER remove the useEffect activeRecord sync in MasterRoute
NEVER generate UUIDs on the client
AgnosticCollection returns empty without an active pageRecord — intentional, not a bug
